title: Layers ( world generation )
description: A realistic world generation tool for a better minecraft!
body:
Layers is a special world generation tool that **changes a lot of things in Minecraft's basic world generation**. The mod changes the following things in the game:

**-The basic world generation (mountains, valleys, etc.)

-Biomes generate vegetation

-Add new biomes to the game.

-Adds new structures to the game like fallen trees or rocks.**

Since the mod changes the basic generation of Minecraft, huge mountains may appear which can be a strain on some machines, so please take this into account before starting the mod, as a weaker image **may cause larger lags**. New updates are always coming to the mod (including new biomes and generation features), so it's worth always keeping an eye out for new updates. 

I hope you enjoy the mod and have a good experience with it!
